[209:01]When it comes to things like this,

[209:04]We don't know.

[209:07]What is being reported and what is most likely is that he died from a heart attack.

[209:14]And this is something that I think dumb people struggle with is that it is okay to live in

[209:21]the uncertainty.

[209:22]It is okay to hold both of these things in our head at the same time.

[209:38]oh, well, obviously Israel did it.

[209:50]Oh, okay.

[210:17]we're gonna get more information

[210:19]that helps us answer those questions.

[210:24]and whether there's an exit wound,

[210:26]recovering all the footage,

[210:36]when the defense defends him.

[216:15]the DACA kids, and I say kids because they're all like

[216:20]he supported then an amnesty of them too.

[216:31]and a massive amnesty for tens of millions of illegals.
